---
title: "CHAPTER TITLE HERE"
execute:
  echo: false
---

# Section Heading

Content goes here.

![Image description](/assets/images/day-XX/example.jpg){.lightbox}  # Example image (update path as needed)

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="85%"}
Content goes here when we're including a clock icon next to it.
:::
::: {.column width="15%"}
<div style="margin-top: 10px">
```{r, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
create_clock(09, 00)  # Replace HH, MM with hour and minute
```
</div>
:::
::::

Content goes here when there's no clock.

:::: {.columns}

::: {.column width="85%"}
<div class=thought_commentary>

# PAUSE FOR THOUGHT OR ACTIVITY

Activity text here.

```{ojs}
viewof thought_example = Inputs.textarea({placeholder: "Type your comments here.", rows: 10})
```

<button class="btn btn-primary" type="button" data-bs-toggle="collapse" data-bs-target="#collapse_example" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="collapse_example">
Click this after writing your comments
</button>

<div class="collapse" id="collapse_1a">
Optional Neave commentary to be revealed after completing the activity.
</div>
</div>
:::

::::

<!--
FOOTNOTES (if needed)
-->

[^a]: Example footnote. Replace or remove as needed.
